text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the waiting room before the spring Tenno Sho,
Ines Fujin psyches herself up by slapping her own
cheeks.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan and McQueen are running today too, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ceding victory in the spring Tenno Sho would be
unthinkable for the prestigious family. No doubt
both Mejiro runners and their supporters will be
giving it their all today.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go out there and get a good sense of
how those two run. Then I'll be even more
prepared next time.
choice_data_list:
But since we're here, do your best to win today,
too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I hope you're ready for the best service
you've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! Ryan! Show the world just how
incredible the Mejiro family is!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wow. All they did was come out of the tunnel,
and the audience is going wild...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek! You're both truly wonderful! I do hope
you'll do your very best to claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I can see the sparkle in their fans' eyes from here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So Ryan and McQueen get showered with all this
attention every time they race...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I get it now. This is what's it like for them—to live
with everyone's hopes on their shoulders!
